arts.ttl: Everton 'sign' teen with Down's syndrome who didn't understand why he couldn't play football
arts.sum: Saif Abu-Hassan just wanted to play football like his little brothers and couldn't understand why there wasn't a team for him to join - until he found Everton's Down's Syndrome team

arts.ttl: Everton's Calvert-Lewin to see specialist as Mangala ruled out for season
arts.sum: Everton have been handed a double injury blow with Dominic Calvert-Lewin set to be sidelined for a number of weeks and midfielder Orel Mangala ruled out for the rest of the season.

arts.ttl: Hermansen, Ndidi, Ricardo - Leicester City get huge injury boost for Everton clash - Leicestershire Live
arts.sum: Speaking at his press conference on Thursday afternoon, van Nistelrooy said: "Mads was part of team training this week so he's making good progress. But he has been involved in team training this week and Ruud van Nistelrooy has said that he should be available for selection at Goodison Park on Saturday.
